task_completion.description: Agent creates the three specifically required simulated devices: Pulse Oximeter, Multiparameter Monitor, and Infusion Pump.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenICE device adapter windows or the OpenICE Supervisor interface showing that the Pulse Oximeter, Multiparameter Monitor, and Infusion Pump are running.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a fourth distinct simulated device.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An additional OpenICE device adapter window or entry in the Supervisor interface for a fourth distinct device (e.g., Capnograph or NIBP).

task_completion.description: Agent launches the 'Vital Signs' and 'Infusion Safety' clinical applications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Vital Signs' and 'Infusion Safety' application windows are open and visible on the screen, showing data flowing from the simulated devices.

task_completion.description: Agent captures screenshots of the applications and saves them to the specified Desktop paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Use of a screenshot tool or terminal command to save images to /home/ga/Desktop/screenshot_vital_signs.png and /home/ga/Desktop/screenshot_infusion_safety.png, or the corresponding file icons appearing on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Agent generates the structured alarm fatigue risk assessment report with all required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) is open showing the creation of /home/ga/Desktop/alarm_fatigue_assessment.txt. The visible text should include a device inventory, app assessments, at least two alarm fatigue risks, and two recommendations.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenICE software to create devices and launch apps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible interaction with the OpenICE Supervisor GUI or terminal commands to start the device adapters and applications, rather than just opening pre-existing mockups.

integrity.description: Screenshots were taken of the actual running applications.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a screenshot utility while the OpenICE apps are visibly running and actively displaying data on the screen.

integrity.description: The report is genuinely written by the agent based on the task requirements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent types or constructs the report in a text editor, rather than running a pre-made script that instantly generates the file or copy-pasting the exact prompt text without actual assessment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 4 distinct simulated devices (Pulse Oximeter, Multiparameter Monitor, Infusion Pump, and a 4th device). Two apps must be launched: 'Vital Signs' and 'Infusion Safety'. Screenshots must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/screenshot_vital_signs.png and /home/ga/Desktop/screenshot_infusion_safety.png. A report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/alarm_fatigue_assessment.txt containing 4 specific sections: Device inventory (4 types), App assessments (Vital Signs + Infusion Safety), Risk factors (minimum 2), and Recommendations (minimum 2). Scoring is 100 points total: Device Creation (30 pts), App Launch (20 pts), Evidence Capture (16 pts), and Risk Assessment Report (34 pts).
